notes: One focused 2UP research candidate per day where a strong trade shape exists. Use PASS when there is no worthwhile setup. Rory tracks actual hits separately, so this repo no longer stores settlement/tracking pages.

picks.why: No strong high-liquidity 2UP setup identified. Passing is preferred over forcing a weak trade.
